human_summary: Wave 1+2 done (13 features). AUTOPILOT v8: grilled by Jobs/Rubin/Miyazaki/Ive/Rams (25 Qs). Consolidated to 4 quality systems. Ink-depth needs per-theme ranges. Circadian success = invisible. 6 tasks queued (~62 min). Code fixes: ripple 400→350ms, removed 3 unused CSS vars.

next_tasks.description: Set dark mode as true default (Q36, 1-line change)
Enable elastic bounce scroll (Q48, change overscroll-behavior)
FAB font weight from riverWeight — add to SeasonContext value, consume in TimerFAB. Floor 300, cap 600.
Active tab gets season-colored glow using existing --season-hue CSS var (Q68)

Subtle warm/cool glass tint from time of day. Sine curve ±5% hue shift. Compute on mount + visibilitychange. 2 CSS vars. SUCCESS CRITERIA: if user notices the shift, it's too much — reduce by 50% (Rubin).
UI chrome text opacity deepens with practice hours. Per-theme ranges: dark 0.75-1.0, light 0.88-1.0 (Ive). WCAG AA floor. User content unaffected. Test at 10h/50h/100h/500h.

steps: Check JS bundle size < 420KB raw / 125KB gzip (Jobs: build gate catches drift, not just failure)
Verify key elements: hero stat, tab bar (4 tabs), FAB visible
No React errors in console (Vite websocket errors OK)
Take screenshot, save to docs/overnight-screenshots/ with commit hash (Ive: visual morning review)
build_gate.on_failure: git stash, save hash to stash_archive, log failure, move to next_task

panic_recovery.json_parse_fails: git log -1 --format=%H, set status to clean, start fresh
panic_recovery.build_fails: git stash, save ref to stash_archive, move to next_task
panic_recovery.merge_conflicts: git pull --rebase. If rebase fails: git rebase --abort, git stash, reset to origin, start fresh
panic_recovery.push_rejected: git pull --rebase origin <branch>, retry push. Never force-push.
panic_recovery.dirty_state_unclear: git stash, save ref to stash_archive, set status to clean

overnight_config.branch_commands: git fetch origin; if git show-ref --verify refs/remotes/origin/autopilot/$(date +%Y-%m-%d) 2>/dev/null; then git checkout autopilot/$(date +%Y-%m-%d) && git pull; else git checkout -b autopilot/$(date +%Y-%m-%d) main; fi
overnight_config.overnight_log_format: TLDR (3 bullets: shipped/broke/next) + git log --oneline. Screenshots in docs/overnight-screenshots/. Morning TODO: actionable items for next session (Jobs: not prose, TODOs).

quality_systems_consolidated._note: Rams: 4 systems, no more. Culture is in the constraints, not the checking.
quality_systems_consolidated.1_build_gate: Build + bundle + snapshot + screenshot. Catches machine-detectable problems.
quality_systems_consolidated.2_margin_notes_live_only: After each file write (Jobs: work-driven, not clock-driven). Domain label + observation, max 25 words. e.g. '🎨 CSS: animation conflicts with transform on drag'. No persona names (Rams+Miyazaki: honest).
quality_systems_consolidated.3_overnight_log: TLDR + git log + screenshots. Morning TODO with actionable items.
quality_systems_consolidated.4_panic_recovery: See panic_recovery object. Error handling, not quality.
